name: io.github.cyberweasel777/botindex
description: BotIndex: AI-native signal intelligence API. Sports odds, crypto correlations, token graduations, agentic commerce comparison. All x402-gated (USDC on Base). 16 tools covering sports betting, DFS optimization, arbitrage detection, meme token tracking, Solana launch monitoring, and cross-protocol commerce comparison (ACP vs UCP vs x402).
